title: UTILITY ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: ST VINCENT DE PAUL FOREST GROVE UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides limited assistance with payment of electric and water bills. May provide limited assistance to people with large bills who qualify and who have not received help previously. 1660 Elm Street Forest Grove, OR 97116 Eligibility: -Meet income guidelines -Be a utility customer with the City of Forest Grove -Have been a resident for at least 12 months -Have not received assistance in the past 12 months Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon Email (503) 357-9647 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 357-9647 Main phone Main phone (503) 357-9647 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. No walk-ins. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Utility bill, photo ID, proof of income AREA SERVED: Cities of Forest Grove, Gales Creek, and Gaston (zip codes 97116, 97117, and 97119) Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - ST VINCENT DE PAUL FOOD PANTRY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ST VINCENT DE PAUL FOREST GROVE
